mapper.select: SELECT al.REAL_DEPTH , al.DEPT_SEQ , IFNULL(al.PAR_ID, "") AS PAR_ID , IFNULL(al.DEPT_ID, "") AS DEPT_ID , IFNULL(al.DEPT_CODE, "") AS DEPT_CODE , IFNULL(al.DEPT_NAME, "") AS DEPT_NAME , IFNULL(al.DEPT_ENG_NAME, '') AS DEPT_ENG_NAME , al.DEPT_FULL_PATH , IFNULL(al.DEPT_DEPTH, 0) AS DEPT_DEPTH , IFNULL(al.DEPT_ORDER, 0) AS DEPT_ORDER , IFNULL(al.DEPT_STAT, 'unused') AS DEPT_STAT , IFNULL(al.DEPT_REG_ID, "") AS DEPT_REG_ID , al.DEPT_REG_DT , al.DEPT_REG_TIME , IFNULL(al.DEPT_MOD_ID, "") AS DEPT_MOD_ID , al.DEPT_MOD_DT , al.DEPT_MOD_TIME FROM ( SELECT fnc.LEVEL AS REAL_DEPTH , hc_dt.DEPT_SEQ , hc_dt.PAR_ID , hc_dt.DEPT_ID , hc_dt.DEPT_CODE , hc_dt.DEPT_NAME , hc_dt.DEPT_ENG_NAME , fnGetDeptFullPath(hc_dt.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_FULL_PATH , hc_dt.DEPT_DEPTH , hc_dt.DEPT_ORDER , hc_dt.DEPT_STAT , hc_dt.DEPT_REG_ID , DATE_FORMAT(hc_dt.DEPT_REG_DT,'%Y%m%d') AS DEPT_REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(hc_dt.DEPT_REG_DT,'%H%i%S') AS DEPT_REG_TIME , hc_dt.DEPT_MOD_ID , DATE_FORMAT(hc_dt.DEPT_MOD_DT,'%Y%m%d') AS DEPT_MOD_DT , DATE_FORMAT(hc_dt.DEPT_MOD_DT,'%H%i%S') AS DEPT_MOD_TIME FROM ( SELECT FNGETDEPTTREE() AS DEPT_ID , @level AS LEVEL FROM (SELECT @start_with:=0, @dept_id:='system', @level:=0) vars JOIN HC_DEPT hm ON hm.DEPT_ID != 'system' WHERE @dept_id IS NOT NULL ) fnc LEFT JOIN HC_DEPT hc_dt ON fnc.DEPT_ID = hc_dt.DEPT_ID ) al WHERE 1=1 AND al.DEPT_STAT != 'delete'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT
FROM HC_DEPT AS hd WHERE hd.DEPT_STAT = 'use' ) hd WHERE 1=1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
FROM HC_DEPT AS hd WHERE hd.DEPT_STAT = 'use' ) hd WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY DEPT_REG_DT ASC

SELECT
, fnGetDeptFullPath(#{deptId}) AS DEPT_PATH FROM HC_DEPT AS hd WHERE 1=1 AND hd.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND hd.DEPT_STAT != 'delete'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HC_DEPT AS hd WHERE 1=1 AND hd.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND hd.DEPT_STAT != 'delete'
mapper.update: INSERT INTO HC_DEPT (DEPT_SEQ , PAR_ID , DEPT_ID , DEPT_CODE , DEPT_NAME , DEPT_ENG_NAME , DEPT_DEPTH , DEPT_ORDER , DEPT_STAT , DEPT_REG_ID , DEPT_REG_DT , DEPT_MOD_ID , DEPT_MOD_DT) VALUES (NEXTVAL(HC_DEPT_SEQ) , #{parId} , concat('ID',LPAD((LASTVAL(HC_DEPT_SEQ)), 5,'0')) , #{deptCode} , #{deptName} , #{deptEngName} , 0 , 0 , #{deptStat} , #{deptRegId} , sysdate() , #{deptModId} , sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HC_DEPT AS hd WHERE 1=1 AND hd.PAR_ID = #{deptId} AND hd.DEPT_STAT != 'delete'
